mapper.select: SELECT tp.plan_no, tp.user_no, tp.plan_title, tp.plan_is_public, tp.plan_status, tp.plan_start_date, tp.plan_end_date, tp.created_date AS createdAt, tp.updated_date AS updatedAt, NVL(u.user_nickName, NVL(u.user_name, 'Traveler')) AS user_name, NVL(ts.travel_type_name, 'adventurer') AS type_id, NVL( ( SELECT MAX(pd.plan_meno) FROM Plan_Details pd WHERE pd.plan_no = tp.plan_no AND pd.plan_meno IS NOT NULL ), NVL(tp.plan_title, 'Untitled Plan') || ' itinerary' ) AS description, 0 AS like_count, NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT rsh.saved_user_no) FROM route_save_history rsh WHERE rsh.source_plan_no = tp.plan_no ), 0 ) AS saved_count, CASE WHEN ts.travel_type_name IS NULL THEN 70 ELSE 90 END AS match_score FROM Travel_Plans tp INNER JOIN Users u ON u.user_no = tp.user_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_no, MAX(travel_type_name) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY travel_analyzed_date NULLS LAST, style_user_no ) AS travel_type_name FROM Travel_Styles GROUP BY user_no ) ts ON ts.user_no = tp.user_no WHERE NVL(tp.plan_is_public, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY tp.plan_no DESC

SELECT tp.plan_no, tp.user_no, tp.plan_title, tp.plan_is_public, tp.plan_status, tp.plan_start_date, tp.plan_end_date, tp.created_date AS createdAt, tp.updated_date AS updatedAt, NVL(u.user_nickName, NVL(u.user_name, 'Traveler')) AS user_name, NVL(ts.travel_type_name, 'adventurer') AS type_id, NVL( ( SELECT MAX(pd.plan_meno) FROM Plan_Details pd WHERE pd.plan_no = tp.plan_no AND pd.plan_meno IS NOT NULL ), NVL(tp.plan_title, 'Untitled Plan') || ' itinerary' ) AS description, 0 AS like_count, NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT rsh.saved_user_no) FROM route_save_history rsh WHERE rsh.source_plan_no = tp.plan_no ), 0 ) AS saved_count, CASE WHEN ts.travel_type_name IS NULL THEN 70 ELSE 90 END AS match_score FROM Travel_Plans tp INNER JOIN Users u ON u.user_no = tp.user_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_no, MAX(travel_type_name) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY travel_analyzed_date NULLS LAST, style_user_no ) AS travel_type_name FROM Travel_Styles GROUP BY user_no ) ts ON ts.user_no = tp.user_no WHERE tp.plan_no = #{value}

SELECT tp.plan_no, tp.user_no, tp.plan_title, tp.plan_is_public, tp.plan_status, tp.plan_start_date, tp.plan_end_date, tp.created_date AS createdAt, tp.updated_date AS updatedAt, NVL(u.user_nickName, NVL(u.user_name, 'Traveler')) AS user_name, NVL(ts.travel_type_name, 'adventurer') AS type_id, NVL( ( SELECT MAX(pd.plan_meno) FROM Plan_Details pd WHERE pd.plan_no = tp.plan_no AND pd.plan_meno IS NOT NULL ), NVL(tp.plan_title, 'Untitled Plan') || ' itinerary' ) AS description, 0 AS like_count, NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT rsh.saved_user_no) FROM route_save_history rsh WHERE rsh.source_plan_no = tp.plan_no ), 0 ) AS saved_count, CASE WHEN ts.travel_type_name IS NULL THEN 70 ELSE 90 END AS match_score FROM Travel_Plans tp INNER JOIN Users u ON u.user_no = tp.user_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_no, MAX(travel_type_name) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY travel_analyzed_date NULLS LAST, style_user_no ) AS travel_type_name FROM Travel_Styles GROUP BY user_no ) ts ON ts.user_no = tp.user_no WHERE tp.user_no = #{value} ORDER BY tp.plan_no DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PLAN_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TRAVEL_PLANS ( PLAN_NO, USER_NO, PLAN_TITLE, PLAN_IS_PUBLIC, PLAN_STATUS, PLAN_START_DATE, PLAN_END_DATE, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE ) VALUES ( #{planNo}, #{userNo}, #{planTitle}, #{planIsPublic}, #{planStatus}, #{planStartDate}, #{planEndDate}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAVEL_PLANS SET PLAN_TITLE = #{planTitle}, PLAN_IS_PUBLIC = #{planIsPublic}, PLAN_STATUS = #{planStatus}, PLAN_START_DATE = #{planStartDate}, PLAN_END_DATE = #{planEndDate}, UPDATED_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PLAN_NO = #{planNo} AND USER_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ROUTE_SAVE_HISTORY ( SAVE_NO, SOURCE_PLAN_NO, SAVED_USER_NO, SAVED_AT ) SELECT SEQ_ROUTE_SAVE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{sourcePlanNo}, #{savedUserNo}, SYSTIMESTAMP FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ROUTE_SAVE_HISTORY rsh WHERE rsh.SOURCE_PLAN_NO = #{sourcePlanNo} AND rsh.SAVED_USER_NO = #{savedUserNo} )
